note: A1: text wins over all layers
A2: PF2 prio=9 wins when text transparent at col=4
A3: PF2 prio=9 beats pivot prio=8 at col=8
A4: pivot prio=8 beats sprite prio=7 at col=4
A5: text px4=5 beats all layers at col=4
A6: PF4 prio=7 wins among all 4 PFs at col=0
A7: PF4 pen=5 at col=0 (xscroll independent per PF)
A8: PF3 prio=6 wins when PF4 prio=3
A9: PF2 prio=5 wins when PF3/PF4 prio=3
A10: sprite wins tie at prio=5 (>= rule)
A11: PF2(9) beats PF1(8) inside clip window at col=100
A13: PF1 visible at left boundary col=50
A14: PF1 visible at right boundary col=200
A15: PF1 clipped at col=201 (just outside right boundary)
A16: blend A, src=green pen=2, dst=white pen=5, a_src=a_dst=4
A17: blend A, a_src=8, a_dst=0 → fully opaque green
A18: blend A, a_src=0, a_dst=8 → dst=white shows through
A19: PF2 opaque (mode=00), just wins with pen=2 (green)
A20: blend B, b_src=6, b_dst=2 over dst=white
A21: sprite prio=10 beats pivot=8 beats PF1=6
A22: pivot prio=8 beats sprite prio=7
A23: pivot disabled → sprite prio=7 wins
A24: pivot(8) wins even over PF1(6) > sprite(5)
A25: PF1 prio=12 beats pivot(8) beats sprite(5)
A26: blend B on PF2 over PF1 with mosaic, col=0
A29: blend B without mosaic, col=0
A30: blend B + mosaic on src and dst PF layers, col=2
B3: scan=42 equal priority PF1 vs PF2 (PF1 evaluated first)
B7: scan=50 col=200 outside clip [0,100] → transparent
B8: scan=51 col=50 outside clip [100,255] → transparent
B9: inverted clip, col=10 outside [50,150] → visible
B10: inverted clip, col=100 inside [50,150] → transparent
B11: scan=30 zoom_x=0 (1:1), col=16 is tile 1 pen=2
B12: scan=31 zoom_x=0x80, col=10 still in tile0
B13: scan=31 zoom_x=0x80, col=16 canvas_x=24 → tile1 pen=2
B14: scan=32 zoom_x=0, col=0 → tile0 pen=1
B15: scan=33 zoom disabled (default 1:1), col=16 → tile1 pen=2
B16: scan=120 a_src=8 a_dst=0 → src only (green)
B17: scan=121 a_src=0 a_dst=8 → dst only (white)
B19: scan=123 a_src=8 a_dst=8 → saturated blend
B20: scan=124 a_src=6 a_dst=2 → asymmetric blend
C1: text px0=7 beats PF1 prio=8 at col=0
C2: text transparent col=4, PF1 prio=8 wins
C3: blend_rgb of text pixel (color=1, pen=7)
C6: sprite covers col=0..15 → sprite wins at col=8
C9: 7-layer col=0 text wins → white blend_rgb
C10: col=1 text transparent → PF2 blend A src=cyan wins
C11: col=8 PF2(10) blend A, sprite(7), pivot(8), PF1(6)
C12: col=16 no sprite, PF2(10) blend A over PF1(6), pivot(8) loses
